Authoring leverage.leakage_risk: Low: uses automated counts and ratios only.
Authoring leverage.method: Ranked from local leverage without exposing variant identity.

Constraint integration.leakage_risk: Moderate: domain content and artifact structure may leak.
Constraint integration.method: Independent review reads masked source/output to judge whether constraints are woven into the artifact.

Grounded expressiveness.leakage_risk: Moderate: domain content and style may leak even after identity masking.
Grounded expressiveness.method: Independent review reads masked source/output because richness and grounding are semantic judgments.

Information yield.leakage_risk: Low-to-moderate: fact extraction reads artifacts, but scoring uses derived counts.
Information yield.method: Ranked from discounted fact units per local source word.

Input readability.leakage_risk: Moderate: source syntax/style may reveal the authoring approach.
Input readability.method: Independent review reads masked source text because readability is not reducible to source length.

Output readability.leakage_risk: Moderate: output style/domain content may leak.
Output readability.method: Independent review reads masked output text because readability is not reducible to density or brevity.

Reusable abstraction quality.leakage_risk: Moderate-to-high: abstraction syntax can leak authoring style, but reading it is necessary for reliability.
Reusable abstraction quality.method: Independent review reads masked source to judge abstraction clarity and reuse.

leak_risk_note: Hybrid blind* scoring uses derived metrics for mechanical criteria and masked source/output review for criteria that require actual reading. The masked review is less blind because domain content, source syntax, or style can leak, but this is necessary to avoid replacing readability and integration judgments with weak length/density proxies.
score_scale: Absolute 1..7 per criterion; higher is better.

variants.notes: Hybrid blind* score: mechanical criteria from derived metrics; semantic/readability criteria from independent masked source/output review.
